description: Audited numerical candidate for the order-3 Arrhenius phase-type constrained search used in Figure 5. This is an audited upper-bound candidate, not a proof of global optimality.
notes: Rates are stored as values at T0. At temperature T, k(T)=k(T0)*exp(E*(1/T0 - 1/T)).
The candidate lies inside the Aldous-Shepp sandwich for n=3 and satisfies R≈2 under analytic and finite-difference audits.
It is used to reproduce the Figure 5 star; the theorem does not rely on this candidate.
